mapper.sql: select t.message_id, t.user_id, t.course_id, t.assignment_id, t.notice_id, t.biz_type, t.message_title, t.message_content, t.sender_user_id, t.send_time, t.read_status, t.read_time, t.link_path, t.expire_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from edu_user_message t
mapper.insert:
insert into edu_user_message
user_id, course_id, assignment_id, notice_id, biz_type, message_title, message_content, sender_user_id, send_time, read_status, read_time, link_path, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{assignmentId}, #{noticeId}, #{bizType}, #{messageTitle}, #{messageContent}, #{senderUserId}, #{sendTime}, #{readStatus}, #{readTime}, #{linkPath}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from edu_user_message where message_id in
#{messageId}
